narrative:
Camden Township has 1,078 registered voters, with 54.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.6%, a clear Republican lean of 8.1 percentage points.
